prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ROTARY-TOOL-KIT-RA9276-IR-TT Product Type: ROTARY_TOOL Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Rotary Tool Accessories Kit with Revolving Stand Crafting Tools 276pc Description: The ToolTreaux rotary tool accessories kit comes with 276 pieces including grindstones, grinding wheels, sandbelts, sandpaper, diamond burrs, and more. All of the included pieces are compatible with most standard dremel and rotary tools.

The accessory tool kit comes with a durable plastic revolving stand to hold your accessories in place when not in use. Easily access the different tools depending on your rotary project needs. All of the accessories feature a 1/8" shank and can be stacked on top of each other for convenience.

These rotary tool accessories are great for a variety of applications including cutting, drilling, carving, grinding, polishing, sanding, and more. Utilize them on different surfaces like stone and ceramics. Make sure to grab this kit of rotary tools before your next hobby or crafting project. Search Terms: rotary cutter rotary tool rotary tools rotary hammer drill rotary cutter blades rotary tool kit drill bit set drill bit drill bit sharpener drill bit extension rotary tool accessories power tools grinders power tools power tools combo kit Features: - 276 ASSORTED ACCESSORIES - ToolTreaux rotary tool kit comes with a variety of 276 accessories including diamond burrs, grindstones, grinding wheels, sand belts, sand paper, and more. Accessories compatible with most standard rotary and dremel tools - INCLUDES REVOLVING STAND - Accessory tool kit comes with durable and sturdy plastic revolving stand that is both lightweight and portable; Easily access the different tools depending on your rotary project needs - 1/8 INCH SHANK - All accessories included feature 1/8 inch shank that will fit most dremel and rotary tools; stack the tools on top of each other for convenience - VARIETY OF USES - Rotary tool accessories are great for a variety of applications including carving, cutting, drilling, grinding, polishing, and sanding on different surfaces - SPECIFICATIONS - Materials: abrasive stone, sandpaper, diamond-coated burrs, plastic; Number of pieces: 276; Shank size: 1/8"; Stackable design === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: 276 Assorted Accessories, Includes Revolving Stand, 18 Inch Shank, Compatible With Dremel Tools

openai.title_differentiation: 276-Piece Assorted Bits, 18" Shank, Revolving Stand, Compatible With Most Rotary Tools, Cutting Grinding Sanding
